title: Eurostat Labour Force Survey

downloads.description: Raw Eurostat API export of dataset lfst_r_lfu3rt, a regional unemployment-rate dataset cited by Eurostat for regional analysis.

access_conditions: Public aggregate access via Eurostat website and API.
Microdata access conditions differ from public aggregate access.
limitations: The downloaded file is a regional unemployment-rate table, not the full EU-LFS microdata corpus.
The current wiki still lacks a single pinned table code covering all unemployment and education use cases.
